name: python3-bluepy
title: python3-bluepy
summary: Python interface to Bluetooth Low Energy on Linux (Python 3)
description:
Python interface to Bluetooth Low Energy on Linux (Python 3)
This package contains a Python module to allow Bluetooth Low Energy (a.k.a
Bluetooth Smart) peripherals to be controlled from Python.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use blescan because Python interface to Bluetooth Low Energy on Linux (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use blescan as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `blescan [options] [args]` as documented upstream for blescan.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair blescan with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `blescan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
